%layout-change @1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 *
%window-pane-changed @1 %2
%layout-change @1 b0c5,220x50,0,0[220x24,0,0,%1,220x25,0,25,%2] b0c5,220x50,0,0[220x24,0,0,%1,220x25,0,25,%2] *
%window-pane-changed @1 %3
%layout-change @1 a1b2,220x50,0,0[220x16,0,0,%1,220x16,0,17,%2,220x16,0,34,%3] a1b2,220x50,0,0[220x16,0,0,%1,220x16,0,17,%2,220x16,0,34,%3] *
%window-pane-changed @1 %1
%layout-change @1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 *
%layout-change @2 8d9e,220x50,0,0,%4 8d9e,220x50,0,0,%4 -
%layout-change @1 4b5aZ,220x50,0,0,%1 4b5a,220x50,0,0,%1 *Z
